title: 📐 Target Resolution & Individual Studio Mode! 🎨
message: Desktop-class image resolution downscaling and manual item-by-item batch editing are finally here! ⚡
points: 📐 Target Resolution: Manually downscale image canvas dimensions (75%, 50%, 24%) to strip megapixels away instantly.
🎨 Individual Studio Mode: Turn off global rules in batch mode to adjust custom presets, sizes, and formats on each photo independently.
⚡ Dynamic Sizing Refreshes: Summary card metrics and new sizing rows now update instantly upon altering resolution dropdown configurations.
🛠️ Under-the-hood optimization improvements for faster, safer multi-threaded batch operations.

title: 📄 PDF Exports & Smarter Sweeping! 🧹
message: We've supercharged your workflow with brand new export options and advanced storage cleaning tools. ⚡
points: 📄 Instant PDF Export: Merge your compressed images directly into a single, shareable PDF document.
🎛️ Custom Sweeper Size: Set your own exact MB limit in the Storage Sweeper to find exactly what you want.
🔄 Quick Rescan: Easily restart your gallery scans with our new quick-action button in the Sweeper.
🛠️ Under-the-hood performance improvements for faster batch processing.

title: ✨ The Update Hub is Here! 🚀
message: We've crafted a beautiful new way to keep you perfectly in sync with our latest tools and features. 🌿
points: 🔔 New In-App Updater: Get instantly notified about fresh features directly on your home screen.
📖 Interactive Changelogs: Discover exactly what's new the moment you update.
🔄 Manual Check: Instantly check for new updates anytime with our new quick-action button.
⚡ Performance Boost: Smoother, distraction-free experience with internal engine tweaks.
